creator: eugene@zhegan.in
text:
Workaround:

1) looks like port misses devel/libepoll-shim dependency.
2) looks like just the installed devel/libepoll-shim isn't enough (I had one), it needs the version containing eventfd.h explicitely.
3) for some reason event when having eventfd.h port wasn't able to find it, so I had to add -I/usr/local/include/libepoll-shim into the $BUILDSRC/config/config.mk file, that got me pass the error.
